title: leontodon hispidus var. glabratus
intro: Leontodon hispidus var. glabratus, commonly known as smooth hawk's-beard or smooth sowthistle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leontodon hispidus var. glabratus include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as supporting digestive health and relieving symptoms of colds and fever. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
